source: RMC-BestFit/src/RMC.BestFit/Analyses/DistributionFitting/FittingAnalysis.cs @ fc28c0c -- A11 EXACT oracle, verified against the real RMC.BestFit FittingAnalysis by the dotnet gate. FittingAnalysis fits the 14 ported candidate distributions (GeneralizedNormal is skipped -- the C++ distribution factory has no case for it; 15 -> 14, so candidate index 11 == Normal; the emitter removes GeneralizedNormal from the C# DistributionList to drive the SAME 14-candidate set) by MLE over an exact-only frame. The GoF metrics come from the seeded DifferentialEvolution optimizer (fixed default prng_seed), so they are deterministic; aic/bic reproduce bit-identically C#-vs-C++, rmse to rel 1e-8 (a distinct GoodnessOfFit summation path). candidate_count is an exact structural invariant (14).
